name: Synup Social vs. Falcon.io
hero_summary: Get a tool that works for you. Falcon.io gives your business rudimentary scheduling and analytics, but it’s not adding to your efforts. On the other hand, Synup Social pulls its weight. Synup Social empowers your team to collaborate - while its AI-powered post creator makes it a collaborator in its own right! From post ideas and optimization to approval workflows and advanced analytics, Synup Social saves you time and money.
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams

counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_heading: Skyrocket your engagement with data-driven posts
section_2_summary: Synup Social empowers you to do more with less. Add a new collaborative member to your team - one who will help you create posts, expedite approval workflows, research trends, and more. While Falcon.io is well-loved by savvy brands and small businesses, Synup Social stands out because of its:
section_2_slider_1_summary: Falcon.io’s analytics lack the post-by-post analysis that will help you understand which of your posts are worth reposting. Falcon.io’s rudimentary analytics lack the details that will help you grow! For real growth, try Synup Social, where you can see which posts are driving engagement over time with interactive engagement graphs. Plus, you’ll get a clear picture of your ROI!
section_2_slider_2_heading: Unique post ideas & AI-powered content creation
section_2_slider_2_summary: Ready to fill your content calendar in half the time? With Synup Social, you can revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more - all in your distinct brand voice. Falcon.io doesn’t fulfill your content creation needs, making posting a hassle. Synup Social’s AI-powered platform inspires your best posts with trend forecasting, competitor tracking, and post analytics. Say goodbye to writer’s block!
section_2_step_3_summary: Say goodbye to silos! Work with your team and clients using Synup Social and see what real collaboration is like. Falcon.io leaves much to be desired with its bare-bones approval workflow, adding hassle and meetings to your workflow. Try cohesively managing all of your content - no offline discussions required. Team members can collaborate on posts, submitting them to supervisors or clients for approval - all on the platform!
section_2_slider_4_summary: Falcon.io provides multi-location support, but it’s clear that the platform isn’t built with enterprises and agencies in mind. With Synup Social, you can schedule multi-location or multi-brand posts simultaneously. Synup Social is the clear choice for agencies, resellers, and multi-location businesses, making it easy to manage everything from one account!

section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Sendible?
why_choose_tab_title_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_heading: What do users love about Synup Social?
testimonial_summary: Synup Social is more than a tool - it’s a collaborator. Our customers love that Synup Social functions as a team member, doing everything from expediting approval workflows and advanced analytics to revolutionary post ideas and optimization. In addition, Synup Social’s collaboration workflow empowers you to spend less time creating and editing content!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Falcon.io and Synup Social are both great scheduling tools, but you deserve an upgrade that will help you grow. With collaborative workflows, AI-powered post generation, user-friendly platform, and multi-location and multi-brand capabilities, Synup Social helps you do more with less!
